entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A staple and nutritious food crop grown in semiarid and arid ecologies of South Asia and Sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region where pearl millet is an important staple crop

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pearl millet is an important staple crop

entities.name: SEMIARID AND ARID ECOLOGIES
entities.description: The environmental conditions where pearl millet is typically grown

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: An environmental factor necessitating the acceleration of genetic gains in pearl millet

entities.name: DEPLETING WATER RESOURCES
entities.description: A resource constraint necessitating the acceleration of genetic gains in pearl millet

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health issue that drives the need for improved pearl millet productivity and nutrition

entities.name: GENETIC GAINS
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a crop population over time due to breeding

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop output that breeding aims to increase

entities.name: OPEN-POLLINATED VARIETIES DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: A historical breeding strategy used before the adoption of hybrid breeding

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding strategy used to accelerate genetic gains and productivity

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY SYSTEM
entities.description: A biological system used as a foundation for hybrid breeding

entities.name: RESTORERS
entities.description: Genetic lines used to restore fertility in cytoplasmic male sterility systems

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Biological materials from India and SSA used to support hybrid breeding

entities.name: GENETIC AND CYTOPLASMIC DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: A strategy applied to hybrid parental lines to improve hybrid performance

entities.name: HYBRID PARENTAL LINES
entities.description: The genetic lines used to produce hybrid cultivars

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: A priority trait for developing pearl millet cultivars

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: A priority trait for developing pearl millet cultivars

entities.name: ANNUAL YIELD INCREASE
entities.description: The realized yearly gain in crop yield, reported as 4% over three decades

entities.name: DROUGHT-PRONE AREAS
entities.description: Target environments for further hybrid breeding efforts in SA and SSA

entities.name: HETEROTIC GROUPING
entities.description: A method of organizing parental lines to sustain long-term genetic gains

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the nutritional value of pearl millet targeted for improvement

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Advanced tools used to exploit genetic variation and accelerate genetic gains

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: A method used to shorten the breeding cycle and accelerate genetic gains

entities.name: PRECISION PHENOTYPING PROTOCOLS
entities.description: Accurate measurement methods used to accelerate genetic gains

entities.name: NATIVE GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The inherent genetic diversity in pearl millet used to drive genetic gains
